html:
Exclusive to:  

“Each use will put out fires, dry and cool survivors 50 degrees to as low as 2.5 degrees in an area.”

-

The Luxury Fan is a Survival item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype and costs 5 Down Feathers, 2 Cut Reeds, and 2 Ropes to craft.

When used, it puts out nearby Fires and reduces body temperature of the player by 50°, potentially causing the player to start Freezing if their temperature is low enough and fully dries all the characters nearby. However, it will never reduce the temperature below 2.5° in the Shipwrecked DLC.

Due to the range of its effect, the Luxury Fan is a good substitute for the Ice Flingomatic to put out fires during Summer, however, if the player starts in Spring, this might be unavailable, due to the Moose/Goose not spawning unless changed in the settings.

In Don't Starve Together, the Luxury Fan will cool down all nearby players when used. Additionally, it will never reduce the temperature below 2.5°.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Flamboyant Fan skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Flamboyant Fan
Everyone will be blown away by this fancy feathered fan.
See ingame

Trivia

  • The Luxury Fan used to be called the "Down Thermantidote" and was directly dropped by the Moose/Goose.
    • Thermantidote is a portmanteau of the words "Thermal" and "Antidote".

Gallery

  • Luxury Fan Using Models
  • Webber using the Luxury Fan.
  • The Luxury Fan's range. 1.5 tiles or 6 walls.
  • The Luxury Fan's range; a rough estimate.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Miscellaneous
"featherfan"
“Down, to bring the temperature down.”
–Wilson
“I dunno... it could put out some fires...”
–Willow
“Ha! Is as big as head!”
–Wolfgang
“That'll make quite a draft.”
–Wendy
“EXCELLENT COOLING SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“This will induce quite an airflow!”
–Wickerbottom
“A traditional Canadian fan.”
–Woodie
“Is it windy out or is it just my fan?”
–Maxwell
“Produces an extraordinary amount of wind.”
–Wagstaff
“The luxuries öf camp, ön the gö.”
–Wigfrid
“This thing is huge!”
–Webber
“An artificial ocean breeze.”
–Walani
“Why is it so big?”
–Warly
“'Tis a sail for me face.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HATH FANCY FAN”
–Wilba
“Fire Outer”
–Wormwood
“Hey, whatever works.”
–Wheeler
“Too fancy.”
–Winona
“It makes a big gust. What's all the fuss?”
–Wortox
“What bird this come from?!”
–Wurt
“I'm a big fan of staying cool. Get it, because it's a fan?”
–Walter
“I've never seen a feather so big! Or have I...”
–Wanda
“Each use will put out fires, dry and cool survivors 50 degrees to as low as 2.5 degrees in an area.”
-
The Luxury Fan is a Survival item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype and costs 5 Down Feathers, 2 Cut Reeds, and 2 Ropes to craft.
When used, it puts out nearby Fires and reduces body temperature of the player by 50°, potentially causing the player to start Freezing if their temperature is low enough and fully dries all the characters nearby. However, it will never reduce the temperature below 2.5° in the Shipwrecked DLC.
Due to the range of its effect, the Luxury Fan is a good substitute for the Ice Flingomatic to put out fires during Summer, however, if the player starts in Spring, this might be unavailable, due to the Moose/Goose not spawning unless changed in the settings.
In Don't Starve Together, the Luxury Fan will cool down all nearby players when used. Additionally, it will never reduce the temperature below 2.5°.

The Luxury Fan used to be called the "Down Thermantidote" and was directly dropped by the Moose/Goose.
Thermantidote is a portmanteau of the words "Thermal" and "Antidote".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quạt Cao Cấp là một vật phẩm Sinh Tồn trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 5 Lông vũ, 2 Sậy cắt và 2 Dây thừng để chế tạo.
